sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UUID, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_uuids VALUES (toUUIDOrDefault('d6f98bfc-5d98-4caf-b882-10ef46717afe', cast('3c63e3c7-0b49-4c37-948e-ee9c6fa3cea9' as UUID)), 'Example 1');
UPDATE test_uuids SET id = toUUIDOrDefault('-----d6f98bfc-5d98-4caf-b882-10ef46717afe', cast('3c63e3c7-0b49-4c37-948e-ee9c6fa3cea9' as UUID)) WHERE name = 'Example 1';
SELECT name, toUUIDOrDefault(id, cast('3c63e3c7-0b49-4c37-948e-ee9c6fa3cea9' as UUID)) FROM test_uuids;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_uuids WHERE id = toUUIDOrDefault('d6f98bfc-5d98-4caf-b882-10ef46717afe', cast('3c63e3c7-0b49-4c37-948e-ee9c6fa3cea9' as UUID));
